fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the start date of the period defined on the line for the bank account balance.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the debit amount for the period on the line.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the credit amount for the period on the line.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies changes in the actual general ledger amount.
